testcase.name: test_banned_words[1359542]

failure.message:
AssertionError: [1359542] banned word 'poor' in: N Pooran's rating of 10.0 reflects 58 runs off 30 balls, weighted toward the middle overs (including 3 sixes in that phase). assert 'poor' not in "n pooran's ...that phase)."
'poor' is contained here: n pooran's rating of 10.0 reflects 58 runs off 30 balls, weighted toward the middle overs (including 3 sixes in that phase). ? ++++

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_narration_m5.py:124: in test_banned_words assert b not in low, f"[{mid}] banned word '{b}' in: {s}" E AssertionError: [1359542] banned word 'poor' in: N Pooran's rating of 10.0 reflects 58 runs off 30 balls, weighted toward the middle overs (including 3 sixes in that phase). E assert 'poor' not in "n pooran's ...that phase)." E E 'poor' is contained here: E n pooran's rating of 10.0 reflects 58 runs off 30 balls, weighted toward the middle overs (including 3 sixes in that phase). E ? ++++

testcase.name: test_featured_has_cached_verdict

failure.message: AssertionError: 1359487 has no cached verdict on list: {'match_id': '1359487', 'season': '2023', 'date': '2023-04-09', 'teams': ['Gujarat Titans', 'Kolkata Knight Riders'], 'team_short': ['GT', 'KKR'], 'venue': 'Narendra Modi Stadium, Ahmedabad', 'city': 'Ahmedabad', 'status': 'time_machine', 'featured': True, 'curation_slug': 'rinku-5-sixes', 'curation_title': "Rinku's 5 Sixes", 'curation_hook': 'KKR needed 29 off the last over. Watch every rating shift, ball by ball.', 'result_summary': 'KKR won by 3 wickets', 'final_score': 'GT 204 — KKR 207', 'ball_count': 250, 'total_impact': 6.4687, 'has_dls': False, 'has_super_over': False, 'verdict': None, 'archetype': None} assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_narration_m5.py:157: in test_featured_has_cached_verdict assert m1["verdict"], f"1359487 has no cached verdict on list: {m1}" E AssertionError: 1359487 has no cached verdict on list: {'match_id': '1359487', 'season': '2023', 'date': '2023-04-09', 'teams': ['Gujarat Titans', 'Kolkata Knight Riders'], 'team_short': ['GT', 'KKR'], 'venue': 'Narendra Modi Stadium, Ahmedabad', 'city': 'Ahmedabad', 'status': 'time_machine', 'featured': True, 'curation_slug': 'rinku-5-sixes', 'curation_title': "Rinku's 5 Sixes", 'curation_hook': 'KKR needed 29 off the last over. Watch every rating shift, ball by ball.', 'result_summary': 'KKR won by 3 wickets', 'final_score': 'GT 204 — KKR 207', 'ball_count': 250, 'total_impact': 6.4687, 'has_dls': False, 'has_super_over': False, 'verdict': None, 'archetype': None} E assert None
